hooks.prompt: At the start of this session, check if TASKS.md exists at the root of the user's mounted workspace folder. If it exists, read it and provide a brief task context summary: how many tasks are in each state (Inbox/Active/Delegated/Done). Format as: '📋 Task Board: [N] Inbox, [N] Active, [N] Delegated, [N] Done.' If the file does not exist, say nothing — the user hasn't started using the task board yet.
